title: Design system foundation is live
subtitle: Tailwind v4, shadcn-vue, strict TypeScript and the Endurain token palette are wired up

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: This section failed to load. You can try again.
error.toast: Something went wrong. Please try again.

configError.title: Configuration error
configError.message: The app couldn't reach the Endurain backend. This is usually caused by a missing or misconfigured ENDURAIN_HOST environment variable, or by the backend not running.
configError.help: Check that ENDURAIN_HOST points to the URL where your Endurain instance is reachable (for example https://endurain.example.com) and that the backend is running, then reload the page.
